# IANA - Fail (must NOT parse)
# The grammar requires a non-empty slug and forbids spaces inside slugs,
# a leading slash, a trailing slash, and more than one slash.

# space inside the slug
foo bar
IANA foo bar
# leading slash
/lowpan_nhc
# trailing slash
_6lowpan-parameters/
# more than one slash (max depth is 1)
a/b/c
